title: shuf
html:
shuf

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

shuf -z /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

shuf -e DATA -o /path/to/output-file
excerpt: shuf File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged shuf -z /path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged shuf -e DATA -o /path/to/output-file
